sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ عَنْ إِصْلَاحِ الطَّرِيقِ الرَّئِيسِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Općina je objavila popravku glavne ulice.
sentences.translationEn: The municipality announced the repair of the main road.

sentences.arabic: سَيَبْدَأُ الْعَمَلُ فِي الطَّرِيقِ غَدَ الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Radovi na ulici počet će sutra ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The work on the road will begin tomorrow morning.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ مِنَ السَّائِقِينَ اسْتِخْدَامَ طَرِيقٍ آخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Općina je zamolila vozače da koriste drugi put.
sentences.translationEn: The municipality asked drivers to use another route.
The repair will be finished within three days.
